title: Mildly Crunchy German Daikon Bowl
description: A funky and crumbly weeknight German dish featuring daikon, served in a stone bowl, inspired by Buddhist temple cuisine
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine grated daikon radish, caraway seeds, rye breadcrumbs, chopped onion, salt, and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar and canola oil.
Pour the vinegar and oil mixture over the daikon mixture and stir until everything is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a stone bowl and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the oven and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Mildly Crunchy German Daikon Bowl hot, straight from the stone bowl.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
